description: The complete, immutable snapshot of market conditions calculated on every completed 5-minute candle. This is the sole input to all execution model evaluators.

ts_utc.description: UTC timestamp of the completed candle close

ts_et.pine_var: timestamp('America/New_York', year, month, dayofmonth, hour, minute)

hour_et.description: Hour of day in Eastern Time

minute_et.description: Minute of hour in Eastern Time

is_rth.description: True if current bar is within Regular Trading Hours (09:30-16:00 ET)

mins_since_rth_open.description: Minutes elapsed since 09:30 ET open (0 if not RTH)

transactions.description: Number of transactions (order flow fragmentation proxy) — MNQ tick data
transactions.pine_var: volume  // NOTE: Pine uses volume; transactions requires custom data feed

ema_structure.description: EMA stack alignment: BULL if ema20>ema50>ema200, BEAR if ema20<ema50<ema200
ema_structure.derivation: if ema20>ema50>ema200: BULL_ALIGNED; elif ema20<ema50<ema200: BEAR_ALIGNED; else: MIXED

price_vs_ema20.description: Close minus EMA20, normalised by ATR14 (signed distance)

trend_direction.description: Directional bias from DI+ vs DI-
trend_direction.derivation: if di_plus > di_minus + 5: BULLISH; elif di_minus > di_plus + 5: BEARISH; else: NEUTRAL

atr_ratio.description: Current ATR14 / 20-period rolling mean of ATR14 (volatility expansion ratio)

rel_volume_20.description: Current volume / 20-period SMA of volume (relative volume)

rel_transactions_20.description: Current transactions / 20-period SMA of transactions (order fragmentation ratio — MVC-003 key variable)
rel_transactions_20.pine_var: transactions / ta.sma(transactions, 20)  // requires tick data feed

participation_state.description: Participation classification based on relative volume/transactions

ov_open.description: Previous RTH close (overnight session opening reference price)
ov_open.derivation: close of last RTH bar of prior session

ov_close.description: Close of the last overnight bar before RTH open

ov_range_vs_atr14.description: Overnight range normalised by ATR14 (MVC-003 key variable)

ov_return_vs_atr14.description: Overnight directional return (ov_close - ov_open) normalised by ATR14

intraday_range_vs_atr14.description: Current day's range (high-low) normalised by ATR14 (D-08 discovery variable)

mvc_001_active.description: MVC-001: High Relative Volume + Large Overnight Range + Bullish Overnight
mvc_001_active.derivation: rel_volume_20 >= 1.33 AND ov_range_vs_atr14 >= 10.85 AND ov_direction == BULLISH

mvc_002_active.description: MVC-002: AM Session + Large Overnight Range + Bullish Overnight
mvc_002_active.derivation: session in [AM_OPEN, AM_SESSION] AND ov_range_vs_atr14 >= 10.85 AND ov_direction == BULLISH

mvc_003_active.description: MVC-003: Participation Surge + Large Overnight Range + Bullish Overnight (B1 core signal)
mvc_003_active.derivation: rel_transactions_20 >= 1.33 AND ov_range_vs_atr14 >= 10.85 AND ov_direction == BULLISH

mvc_004_active.description: MVC-004: High ADX + Large Overnight Range + Bullish Overnight
mvc_004_active.derivation: adx_14 >= 35 AND ov_range_vs_atr14 >= 10.85 AND ov_direction == BULLISH

mvc_005_active.description: MVC-005: Participation Surge + Bullish Overnight + Expanding Intraday
mvc_005_active.derivation: rel_transactions_20 >= 1.33 AND ov_direction == BULLISH AND intraday_range_vs_atr14 >= 1.00

mvc_006_active.description: MVC-006: Large Overnight Range + Bullish Overnight + Expanding Intraday
mvc_006_active.derivation: ov_range_vs_atr14 >= 10.85 AND ov_direction == BULLISH AND intraday_range_vs_atr14 >= 1.00

mp_001_regime_active.description: MP-001: Regime Dependence — EMA structure is aligned (not MIXED)

mp_002_adx_sufficient.description: MP-002: ADX Thresholds — trend strength sufficient for directional models

mp_003_session_optimal.description: MP-003: Session Asymmetry — current session has historically positive expectancy

mp_004_volcomp_active.description: MP-004: VolComp→Expansion — volatility compression followed by expansion signal

mp_005_streak_clear.description: MP-005: Loss Streaks = Regime Transitions — ARI consecutive loss counter is clear (< 2)
mp_005_streak_clear.derivation: ari_consecutive_losses < 2  // sourced from ARI state, not MSE

ari_consecutive_losses.description: Number of consecutive portfolio losses (sourced from ARI, included in MSO for model awareness)

ari_daily_pnl.description: Current day's realised P&L across all models (sourced from ARI)

ari_active_position.description: True if any model currently has an open position

ari_circuit_breaker.description: True if ARI circuit breaker is engaged (no new trades permitted)
